headlines.headline: Key figure in alleged hoops gambling schemes to plead guilty
headlines.description: Marves Fairley, a Mississippi sports bettor, has agreed in writing to plead guilty to being one of the "fixers" in the NCAA point-shaving case in the Eastern District of Pennsylvania.

headlines.headline: Betting tips, DFS picks for Tuesday's three NBA playoff games
headlines.description: Eric Moody breaks down Tuesday's three NBA playoff games and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

headlines.headline: Ex-NBA player Damon Jones 1st to plead guilty in gambling case
headlines.description: Former NBA player and assistant coach Damon Jones has become the first person to plead guilty in a gambling sweep that led to the arrests of more than 30 people, including reputed mobsters and other basketball figures.

headlines.headline: Perk's KD take has Stephen A. shocked
headlines.description: Kendrick Perkins doesn't believe Kevin Durant is a desirable player for teams, drawing a shocked reaction from Stephen A. Smith.

headlines.headline: Ex-Cowboys QB Tony Romo fails to advance in U.S. Open qualifying
headlines.description: Former Cowboys QB Tony Romo will have to try another year to make it to the U.S. Open after he shot a 9-over 79 and missed out by 11 shots in a local qualifier.

headlines.headline: Eagles assistant GM, senior VP departing after lengthy tenures
headlines.description: Two key members of the Eagles front office, Alec Halaby and Bryce Johnston, announced their departures from the organization this week after lengthy tenures with the team.

headlines.headline: Steelers place seldom-used UFA tender on Aaron Rodgers
headlines.description: The Steelers placed the seldom-used UFA tender on quarterback Aaron Rodgers on Tuesday, which preserves Pittsburgh's right to receive a compensatory draft pick in the event that Rodgers signs with another team before July 22.

headlines.headline: Schefter not convinced Simpson would have been 1st-rounder if not for Rams
headlines.description: Adam Schefter reflects on the Rams selecting Ty Simpson with the 13th pick in the NFL draft.

headlines.headline: Have the Sabres figured out the formula to win the Stanley Cup?

headlines.headline: The top plays from the NHL playoffs on Monday
Shea Theodore's OT goal lifts Golden Knights to Game 4 win
headlines.description: Shea Theodore scored on a snap shot from the high slot with 51.5 seconds left in overtime as the Vegas Golden Knights beat the Utah Mammoth 5-4 on Monday night after squandering a three-goal lead, tying the first-round playoff series at two games apiece.
